---
listing:
  contents: "20notes/*.qmd"
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  image-placeholder: img/image-placeholder.png
  fields: [image, date]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true

format:
  html:
    theme:
      - iframe_match.scss
    css: _entry_dark_vars.css
    include-in-header: preprocessing.html
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-listing .card .card-body {
    padding: 0.35rem 0.6rem !important;
    font-size: 0.75rem !important;
}
.quarto-listing .card .listing-date {
    font-size: 0.75rem !important;
}
</style>
```
